caption: Table 128. Document revision history
rows: Renamed Section 3.31 into True random number generator (RNG). Replaced V by V in Section 6: Electrical characteristics. DDIOx DD Updated I in Table 10: Current characteristics. IO Updated Table 24: Typical current consumption in Autonomous mode, Table 27: Typical and maximum current consumption in Standby mode and Table 28: Typical and maximum current consumption in VBAT mode. Added Section 6.3.15: I/O current injection characteristics. Removed reference to PI8 in Table 52: Output voltage characteristics for all I/Os except PC13, PC14 and PC15 and Table 53: Output voltage characteristics for PC13, PC14 and PC15. Added Section : Analog switch between ports Pxy_C and Pxy.

Added indication that patents apply to the devices in Section : Features. Added reference to errata sheet in Section 1: Introduction. Table 1: STM32H733xG features and peripheral counts: – Changed number of general-purpose 32-bit timers to 4. – For LQFP100 and TFBGA100 packages, replaced 2 Octo-SPI/Quad-SPI interfaces by 1 and remove note. In Section 3.8.1: Power supply scheme, changed V power supply DD requirements. Changed USART communication speed to 17 Mbit/s in Section 3.37: Universal synchronous/asynchronous receiver transmitter (USART). Table 7: STM32H733 pin and ball descriptions: – Added Note 1. to the package pin/balls corresponding to Pxy_C. – For PA15(JTDI), replaced SPI3_NSS/I2S3_WS aternate function by SPI3_NSS(boot)/I2S3_WS. Moved LSI clock from backup domain to VDD domain in Figure 10: Power supply scheme. Added V in Table 12: General operating conditions. BAT Updated Table 15: Operating conditions at power-up/power-down title and added t . VCORE Updated measurement conditions for Typical and maximum current consumption. Section : On-chip peripheral current consumption: updated measurement conditions and Table 29: Peripheral current consumption in Run mode. Updated Table 31: High-speed external user clock characteristics. Renamed parameter into I in Table 51: I/O static characteristics. ILEAK lkg

Updated Table 31: High-speed external user clock characteristics. Changed unit for PLL long-term jitter in Table 39: PLL1 characteristics (wide VCO frequency range). Renamed I into I in Table 51: I/O static characteristics LEAK kg Table 55: Output timing characteristics (HSLV ON): updated load capacitance condition for t/t and for speed = 10. r f Updated Figure 30: OCTOSPI SDR read/write timing diagram, Figure 31: OCTOSPI DTR mode timing diagram, Figure 32: OCTOSPI Hyperbus clock timing diagram, Figure 33: OCTOSPI Hyperbus read timing diagram and Figure 34: OCTOSPI Hyperbus write timing diagram. Updated sampling rate fro slow channels in Table 80: 16-bit ADC characteristics. Updated Figure 35: ADC accuracy characteristics and Figure 36: Typical connection diagram when using the ADC with FT/TT pins featuring analog switch function as we as notes below figure. Table 89: Temperature sensor characteristics updated T max value. L Changed temperature condition to 130 °C for TS_CAL2 in Table 90: Temperature sensor calibration values. Updated Figure 37: Power supply and reference decoupling (V not REF+ connected to V ) DDA Updated Figure 44: USART timing diagram in master mode and Figure 45: USART timing diagram in slave mode. Updated Figure 54: SD high-speed mode, Figure 55: SD default mode and Figure 56: SDMMC DDR mode. Updated Figure 60: Ethernet MII timing diagram. Updated Figure 63: LQFP100 - Outline(15), Table 129: LQFP176 - Mechanical data, and Figure 72: TFBGA100 - Recommended footprint.

Updated Figure 1: STM32H733xG block diagram. In Table 4: STM32H735xG features and peripheral counts: changed the number of available Ethernet MII and SAI PDM interfaces. Updated Section 3.39: Serial peripheral interface (SPI)/inter- integrated sound interfaces (I2S). Updated Section 3.40: Serial audio interfaces (SAI). Added note to Chapter 6.2. Updated I definition in Table 10: Current characteristics. IO Updated V in Table 12: General operating conditions to cover the case of IN Pxy_C.

In Table 16: Reset and power control block characteristics: – renamed power-on/power-down reset threshold V into POR/PDR V . BOR0/POR/PDR – updated description of V . hyst_POR_PDR – renamed Hysteresis voltage for Power-on/power-down reset (including BOR0) into V . hyst_POR_PDR Updated measurement conditions for Typical and maximum current consumption parameters. Updated Section : High-speed external clock generated from a crystal/ceramic resonator. Updated Table 47: EMI characteristics for fHSE = 8 MHz and fCPU = 550 MHz. Updated Section : I/O static current consumption and Section : I/O dynamic current consumption. Updated V and V in Table 51: I/O static characteristics and Table 52: IH OH Output voltage characteristics for all I/Os except PC13, PC14 and PC15, respectively, to cover the case of Pxy_C I/Os. Updated note 2 in Table 54: Output timing characteristics (HSLV OFF) and Table 55: Output timing characteristics (HSLV ON).. Reorganized Section 6.3.18: FMC characteristics and updated Figure 26: NAND controller waveforms for read access and Figure 27: NAND controller waveforms for write access. Updated t in Table 82: 16-bit ADC accuracy. TRIG Changed V maximum value (buffer ON) in Table 86: DAC DAC_OUT characteristics. Updated f maximum value in Table 98: DFSDM measured timing. DFSDMCLK In Table 107: USART characteristics, changed t and t into w(SCKH) w(SCKL) t and t , respectively. w(CKH) w(CKL) Updated Figure 46: SPI timing diagram - slave mode and CPHA = 0, Figure 47: SPI timing diagram - slave mode and CPHA = 1 and Figure 48: SPI timing diagram - master mode. Updated Figure 51: SAI master timing waveforms and Figure 52: SAI slave timing waveforms.
